系统服务有没有挂掉的? 帮我列一下 failed 的 systemd 单元.

content.content: {"target_name": "incident-host", "inspector_name": "linux.systemd.failed_units", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "message": "One or more systemd units are in the failed state (see failed for details)", "evidence": [], "tags": []}]}

content.text: 有 2 个 systemd 单元处于 failed 状态: nginx.service 与 mysql.service. 建议查看各自的 journal 日志定位启动失败原因.

messages.content:
系统服务有没有挂掉的? 帮我列一下 failed 的 systemd 单元.

## 已采集的 findings (按序号标签)

- [F1] severity=critical inspector=linux.systemd.failed_units tags=- evidence=0 :: One or more systemd units are in the failed state (see failed for details)

input.description: nginx.service 与 mysql.service 同时 failed 是根因: 两个核心服务单元均未拉起, 对外服务能力受影响.
suggested_actions: 查看 nginx.service 与 mysql.service 各自的 journal 日志定位启动失败原因.
修复配置或依赖后重启两个单元并确认状态恢复.
